docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-12-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LIBERTY HOME BUILDER SUPPLY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,017.73 FILED BY RICHARDSON, MARLO RICHARDSON, ALLEN AS TO DEFENDANT LIBERTY HOME BUILDER SUPPLY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-18-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT LIBERTY HOME BUILDER SUPPLY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-18-2008 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-22-2009 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. APPEARANCES BY BOTH SIDES. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM (UNTIMELY). COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
NO APPEARANCES. DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PENELOPE PAHL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
